commit.subject: LU-17906 tests: debug conf-sanity/151b+153a timeout
commit.message:
LU-17906 tests: debug conf-sanity/151b+153a timeout

Add debugging to conf-sanity test_151b and 153a to
understand why it is having regular timeouts
on Janitor testing.

Test-Parameters: ignore testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I32dd32ce66159501555457e6db08409226254035
